name: Solo Parent Benefits (RA 11861)
description: Legal benefits for solo parents including Solo Parent ID, additional leave, and priority in government programs
benefits: 7-day paid leave/year, 10% discount on baby essentials, priority in 4Ps and housing, educational support for children
documents: Solo Parent ID application form (from MSWDO)
office: Municipal Social Welfare and Development Office (MSWDO)
next_steps: Apply for Solo Parent ID at your MSWDO
Submit documentary proof of solo parenting status
Receive Solo Parent ID valid for 1 year (renewable)
Present ID when applying for 4Ps, housing, or educational aid for priority
